summary:
GLOBAL CONFLICT VISIONS: Brandon describes seeing massive underground tunnels in Iran, resembling ant dens, used to hide missiles and military equipment moved on flatbed carts. He notes that American bombers are targeting these deep bunkers to flush out arsenals. Furthermore, Brandon recounts visions of Emmanuel Macron escalating nuclear capabilities and acting as a tyrant, alongside Turkey's leader meeting with Vladimir Putin to block the Dardanelles strait and use unconventional weapons in Ukraine. He also mentions Kim Jong-un sending troops to assist Russia and Iran, predicting his eventual removal.

DEMONIC RITUALS AND ISLAMIC END TIME PROPHECIES: Brandon discusses satanic rituals connected to the Olympics, claiming that ancient black tablets are being scanned by artificial intelligence and quantum computers to conjure the Hitler spirit and open portals for the antichrist, known as the Mahdi. He references news reports confirming that the Islamic world has spent decades preparing for the Mahdi's arrival, believing a major war with Israel and America is necessary to trigger this event. In response, Brandon emphasizes the need to pray over American soil, especially during the Easter season, to prevent surprise terrorist attacks.

THEOLOGICAL REFLECTIONS AND PROPHETIC LEVELS: Brandon reviews John Bevere's book regarding the returning king, praising its explanation of Jewish wedding customs as a metaphor for Christ's return for a pure, uncompromised bride. He urges listeners to keep their spiritual lamps full of oil and remain separate from worldly influences. Brandon then explains the three levels of prophetic vision he was shown, comparing them to a watchman's natural sight, magnified sight, and Holy Ghost radar. He notes that ascending to higher prophetic levels requires immense trust, dying to self, and keeping quiet until God permits him to speak. Additionally, he warns against harboring personal offense, explaining how it dulls his ability to hear God's voice clearly, and shares his practice of spiritual self-examination to maintain intimacy with the Lord.

FUTURE GEOPOLITICS AND ECONOMIC UPHEAVAL: Brandon details several upcoming global events, including a warning that Xi Jinping is preparing to implement a plan to overthrow Taiwan in a swift three-day operation. He also recalls a vision regarding a massive war between Israel and Iran, where an American missile strikes an Iranian underground city, severely crippling their economy and nuclear program. This conflict will allegedly trigger a gas war, driving oil prices to two hundred dollars a barrel, which will temporarily stimulate the American economy through increased domestic drilling and pipeline deals. Additionally, Brandon foresees Donald Trump dismantling the BRICS financial system, strengthening the US dollar, while European leaders attempt to push a digital crypto beast system.

ASSASSINATION VISIONS AND INTERCESSORY PRAYER: Brandon describes a vivid vision of a Reza Pahlavi being assassinated on stage, predicting that a radical figure like the Ayatollah will then take power. He transitions into deep intercessory prayer, calling on intelligence agencies like the CIA and Mossad to uncover hidden tunnels and weapons. His prayers extend to protecting Donald Trump and his family, specifically Don Jr. and Eric, from retaliation, as well as safeguarding Marco Rubio and the USS Abraham Lincoln. Brandon concludes by prophesying an unprecedented global spiritual revival, specifically highlighting regions like South America, China, North Korea, and local congregations, declaring that the underground church will witness miraculous events amidst global shaking.
rawData: [March 04, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/6YMi3ZJxq8M]-[Good evening, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me again tonight. We have a lot of work to do, things I have in my spirit to pray about. We aren't going to waste a lot of time because I came on late. It takes me a little bit because I haven't been eating fast food junk. I cook my food fresh every day using whole foods. I am trying to do well and keep my calories logged. Diana found a neat app that helps me weigh my food in a bowl every day to track how many ounces I'm eating. It's a real treat. I'm not complaining, Father; I'm so thankful I am able to measure and weigh our food. Not that you probably care, but it's interesting. That is why it takes me a little longer; I am navigating a new learning curve. We are going to pray real quick, and then I'll let you go so you can have your night. Most of you are probably going to bed, but I felt in my heart when Braden was telling me the news about reports of Iranians hiding missiles. If you go back three videos, the Spirit of God showed us massive underground tunnels. I said you could use a train to move through them based on what I was seeing. There were railroad cars for these heavy missiles. I saw them moving them on flatbed carts, similar to the rails used in mining to lift coal or gold. They were long and filled with missiles and various military equipment underground. Reports today suggest they know about 50%, though it changes constantly due to fake news and AI videos. From what I understand, they have quite a few found silos or missile hiding spaces, but they still cannot find 50% or more of them. They're using our big bombers with payloads of 70,000 lbs to drop on these targets to try to reach underground and bust these so-called tunnels. Braden found an announcement this morning. This is Iran bragging that they have all this underground, saying, 'We're fixing to use all this on you.' Braden posted things on X for you. I want to see the one with the tunnels. I didn't get to watch it all the way through. Braden said this goes along with what the Lord showed me. Look at those tunnels. I don't see railroad tracks, so I don't know about that. This looks like they have wheels and can be moved that way. In what I saw, it looked sandy, and they were taking them from one bunker to another to avoid detection. These are massive underground facilities. Do you know how much money that is? My goodness, that's a lot of money to build those tunnels underground. Look at all that weaponry. As I was shown in the spirit, they were all connected like ant dens. You can stir the top of the ant den, but you're only seeing the effect on top, not what is going on underneath. They have all this underground. I saw bunkers deep down. The more they were being attacked by America, the deeper they would put their equipment to avoid being annihilated. Braden said this matches what the Lord showed me. There are reports about other things the United States has hit. They're saying they have a missile coming out of a tunnel. That massive thing looked like a megaton. I guess we hit it, but look how big that thing is. That's what I feel in my heart. Excuse my allergies; I'm overcoming them tonight. Spring has sprung before officially getting here in Oklahoma. The trees and flowers are blooming, and I pray we don't have a freeze that kills them. I thought it was interesting that Emmanuel Macron jumped in the fight tonight. Did anybody hear what Emmanuel Macron said? Go ahead and play Emmanuel Macron. Basically, Emmanuel Macron is saying he is taking his boat and will start beefing up his nuclear capabilities. It goes along with what I have seen concerning Emmanuel Macron. The Lord said in the days ahead he will be raised up to be a tyrant. Is he doing that now? No, he's just acting like he wants to be involved. I believe what the Lord showed us last video was when I saw Turkey building and taking over that Strait area, that little crossing. I was shown by the Spirit of God Turkey rising up, and I saw massive war drums beating in the Black Sea. I saw the Turkish leader, whether he is the prime minister or president—I don't know his title—put on a Count Dracula cape with a massive collar and a brooch. He looked like he was from an old Dracula movie with slicked-back hair. Braden made an AI image of it. He looked toward the west at the waterway to the Ukraine area and southern Europe. He was eyeing it. Then I heard him having a meeting with Vladimir Putin. They were discussing how they were done playing the cat and mouse game. I heard unconventional weapons of war, like we've never seen before, being used by Putin. Mega stuff. I saw Turkey being involved to block the waterway to get into the Black Sea to defend and try to help with Ukraine and the things ahead. I saw Russia annihilating Zelensky and doing the thing, and I saw above Ukraine and in this area WW3 really big across it, and I saw it go from all over Europe. That's what I saw right there. The Dardanelles straits? Yeah, can you show them? That's what I saw, Turkey taking over and making it where it was impossible to go into the Black Sea. Now, I don't know if there's any other ways. But what I saw—where's Ukraine at? Ukraine's right there. It's like you see Constantinople. No, you got to move it down. Okay, that's where Ukraine's at. I see it here. So that's why I saw them controlling that to try to help Russia. Then I saw Kim Jong-un sending tens of thousands of troops to Ukraine and helping Iran in the days ahead, flexing. He started to become paranoid because he thinks he's next, which I pray with all my heart he is. Wouldn't that be wonderful if he was removed, too? That man is terrible to those North Koreans. He's crazy, too. As I was seeing, I linked it back to what the Lord showed me concerning the Olympics and that satanic thing in that arch when I told you. People said, 'Brandon, that's not a word,' but they were conjuring up the Hitler spirit by satanic practice, bringing forth through these tablets that I saw—old ancient satanic writing that was like in hieroglyphics on tablets. I don't know what this was, but it was on a black, like onyx-looking tablet, and they were trying to read through AI scans because it's hard for them to understand what it was. But they were trying to scan it with an AI, with a computer, with quantum computing to try to open up portals to bring forth the antichrist, the Mahdi. What is even being said all over the world right now? Even Diana said this morning somebody sent her an article from, I believe it was a major news channel, saying that's what these major religious people are saying. We have been—Iran has been prepared for this for decades now, waiting for this event. That's Fox. Okay, so you found it. They can see it. It's Fox. So they are all ready and preparing for who they call the Mahdi. And they said that this major event had to happen, and they're excited about it. And they've been prepared and have been preparing for decades now because they want the Mahdi to come. And they know he'll come through war. Whenever Diana was reading—she read the whole thing to me—I said, 'Oh my gosh, do we really realize that even the Islamic world realizes how close we are to the end of the end?' And they're preparing for it. They needed this war with Israel and with America, the great Satan, to stir it all up, to bring forth their Islamic savior. And this is during Ramadan. This is all during their Ramadan. And the Lord said, 'This is why I'm praying over America and our soil.' And the Lord said, 'Pray over Easter.' If you remember, a week or two weeks ago, the Lord said—I don't even remember now how far—he said, 'Pray over Easter.' It's just a week later, after Ramadan is over, that Easter and Palm Sunday take place. So we're praying over our churches for America and for surprise attacks, for our Homeland Security to find all of it, for the FBI, all of it. There's a lot of chatter, from what I understand. So with all that being said, folks, this is just escalating. You know, I talked to Pastor Candace where we go to church. She called last night, going over everything of what I believe the Lord has been showing me and relating it to Bible prophecy and where we are with the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ and the revival that we believe we're right there. She told Diana and me, 'I've been reading books on the glory, stirring myself up on old books of the glorious church rising and old prayer books about the glory and meditating on the glory and walking in it like an Azusa Street and stirring myself up.' If I go back to what the Lord said even about the false alien visitations that I believe we'll have in the days ahead with the wars and the rumors of wars and everything he said about Matthew 24 and the men being offended and the great apostasies and the falling away and all the things. Then we got John Bevere's book today, 'The King is Coming,' I believe is what it's called. I'm going to tell you the first chapter—I'm going to be real with you and always tell you the truth—the first chapter was kind of boring. It's just the opening, get you ready for it. Second chapter better. By the time Diana got into the fourth, fifth, and sixth chapters, she read to me in the car. It seemed like all evening she's been reading to me because she loves John Bevere's books and she's like, 'Oh my god, this book is phenomenal.' But when I first heard the first chapter, I thought it was kind of slow. And then all of a sudden you felt the anointing shift and I thought, 'Woohoo! It's a winner.' And so I got so excited, especially the chapter about the Jewish wedding ceremony. Phenomenal. I didn't know the custom. If we go back to the vision that I had where Jesus was standing underneath the hoopa—it was the pillar, the post, and there were olive leaves carved into it, and it was all in this lacquer. It was beautiful. This hoopa with lace and all kinds of things on it, and he was waiting on the bride. He was a flame of fire there waiting. And as he goes into the Jewish wedding ceremony and how it correlates—it's a type and shadow of Jesus coming back for his church—it was the most beautiful thing to me personally. I told Diana, 'I could read that chapter four or five times.' Because of our culture, we're ignorant Americans; we don't know much about Jewish culture and what it meant for Jesus and what he was talking about. But even when John Bevere said the disciples did—well, yeah, because that was their tradition, that's the way they lived. But us, we don't know the tradition of Jewish culture back when Jesus's timeframe was. But he describes it all and how it correlates with the body of Christ right now, and I was like, 'Oh my gosh, this is so cool.' And so it blessed me a lot. Like I said, I haven't read the whole book, so I can't tell you I love the whole thing, but I can tell you from what I have heard my wife read to me, it is an A+ so far. I give it an A+. He goes into pre-trib, mid-trib, and post-trib, right? Yeah. So you hear his point of view about it and how he brings scripture into it and where his stance is, which is just like mine. We're not appointed unto wrath. I believe with all my heart that God's not a wife-beater. And it goes along even with the point of what I've told you of keeping your lamps full of oil, not being in bed with the world. Be separate unto him. Be expecting a purified bride, a purified Jewish culture. A bride was waiting for her husband for that year. He even said that the bride was not in bed with the world; she was separated for her groom. It was just the stuff that was the type and shadow. My goodness. This is why I've been telling you: you must get on fire for Jesus. You must be all-in. You have to get your lamp full of oil. It's time to get out of compromise. You have to be that bride, that vessel without spot or wrinkle. The only way you're going to do that is by being separate and holy unto him. Like Billy Burke, we talk about God. I have all of God; God needs more of me while he's inside of me. He is dwelling on the inside of me, but I've got to die to self and give him more of me. It's the refining fire; it's coming up higher. You can either fly with the crows or you can fly with an eagle. The Lord showed me about the prophetic yesterday. He said, "You want to know more about the prophetic?" I said, "Yeah, I would like to know. When I get to a certain place in the visions that you're showing me, it feels like a lid." He said, "It's on purpose. The higher you go with me, the greater the responsibility for what I reveal to you, so you can't just flippantly say everything out of your mouth." There were three different levels of the prophetic that he showed me. He said this level down here, you can see as a watchman; you're able to see with your natural eye what I want to say. I'm just paraphrasing, so just follow me. You're on the wall and you can see, but then at the next level, you have magnifying glasses and you can see magnified; you can see quite a ways. But then when you get to the next level, you've got radar, and the radar is going beep-beep, and you're going, "Oh, I didn't see that." Why? Because it's Holy Ghost radar. As I was seeing in the spirit, the higher you go with him, the more you are required to keep your mouth shut until he is releasing you to say more. To whom much is given, much is required. Down here, he said that's where a lot of people dwell because that's where their trust level is. To go from glory to glory requires trust. To whom much is given, much is required. Do you want to walk in the greater manifestations of me like Elijah, like the prophets of old who were more sold out? There is a level of intimacy that a lot of the culture today has no idea about. That's what he was talking to me about over the last 48 hours since the last video we did. I know the price because it costs a lot. Just to get where I am right now has cost a lot. I said, "Lord, to get to the next summit, to go higher and fly in the higher space with the eagles, to go from glory to glory..." the air gets even thinner the higher you go. It's all about dying to self and not worrying about what people think. So, all that being said, it's a cultivation. Where are we today? I try to keep you updated on what's going on in my own personal life and what he talks to me about. He starts talking about investments, how to grow your money, and being blessed, going from glory to glory, being a steward over what he's given you, and how he cares about every little thing in your life. He cares about your finances, your health, eating right, and taking care of your temple. He wants us to go from glory to glory and live a long life. He wants us, beloved—I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers. And if you're not prospering in your soul, you aren't prospering in the natural. I want to be blessed in the city and in the field, coming in and going out, but not only that, in my soul—your mind, will, and emotions. You do that by renewing your mind with the Word of God. It's not just a one-time thing. I think it was FF Bosworth who said people eat three times a day for their flesh and only one little bit of food for their spirit once a week on Sundays. They feed their flesh all week long but only feed their spirit one meal a week. I was thinking about that, and it's the truth for many. I truly believe the reason the Lord brought me on YouTube, X, and all these other platforms is to tell people that he's coming, but also that you must have a relationship with him and be intimate with him through the Word of God, prayer, and separation. You have to come up higher. I told you very strongly—I even told my little brother—that you don't understand, a storm's coming. I heard one lightning strike, and we never heard any more lightning or thunder that night. It was just that one moment. I said, "A storm is coming," and then it went crack—it was loud and shook the house. Never again did it the rest of the time; it didn't even rain. Most people said that was AI or that we made it up. I'm telling you on a stack of Bibles, it was real. We did not make that up with AI. That was the Lord, and it was a sign. I'm not here to try to deceive you. It was the Lord trying to warn you. As it shook the house, it tripped me out. I had goosebumps on goosebumps. Braden and I were just looking at each other. After it was over, that's all we could talk about because of the force of the thunder; it shook the whole home. I thought, "Oh my goodness, Lord, you're a God of signs," but it's an emphasis. He's emphasizing where we are. There's a storm coming. Yesterday the Lord said Xi Jinping has made his decision. He's getting ready to implement the plan concerning Taiwan. I do not want to say this to scare you; I say this to prepare you to pray. As I was seeing that, it took three days to overthrow it. I saw it happen again. It took three days, similar to what happened with Maduro. They came in like stealth in the middle of the night, and there was not much of a fight. I saw it. Now, can we change it? I believe we can. I believe there are things we can pray and stop or delay. But this is what I see. I see in part. I saw into Russia, the cat and mouse, and these unconventional weapons of war—weapons we've never seen before out of Russia. They aren't holding back the big stuff anymore, using weapons that were shock and awe. Then I want to show you the clip concerning the gas wars. Braden made this short and said, "Daddy, do you remember saying this?" I said, "Yeah, I remember part of it." This was on June 1st, 2025. So, here we are. I gave this word from the Lord. Now, are we about to see that? I don't try to add to or take away from anything and say, 'Well, that's where we are right now.' But if I go by what I saw, could we be there? In my opinion, we could. We could be right there. I thought this was interesting because Braden found this; he was looking through my videos to find things for shorts. Look at what the Lord said: 'I saw a great war breaking out with Israel and Iran in the days ahead.' I told you back in January that I saw an American missile striking a mountain that was an underground city. Iran set all kinds of deterrents trying to stop this missile. It was a very powerful one. When Israel does this, I saw that they set Iran back financially, nuclear—everything. I heard the Spirit of the Lord say they put them back in the Stone Age. When they do this, they strike their refineries, and I saw gas and oil prices skyrocketing. I've warned you about this since 2023. Then the Lord showed me in that vision the 1970s gas wars. I saw cars lined up down the blocks because of gas shortages. It would bring the price of oil up to $200 a barrel. Big money trying to flow would stimulate the American economy whenever these big oil productions get hit in the Middle East. It would happen for a season, for a window. I don't know how long, but for a window. I saw 'drill, baby, drill.' I saw pipelines being opened up and worked out, making major agreements. The Nord Stream pipeline, I believe, is what it's called. I saw it being talked about and opened up, trying to get this deal going, doing major oil deals ahead and stimulating America's economy. But when this happens, I saw great antisemitism because people are mad at Israel about what they're about to do. Remember this: I saw them wanting to retaliate with war—Russia, Syria, Turkey. I saw them getting upset in the Middle East against Israel. Have we changed it through prayer? I don't believe we have. So, are we there? I don't know. It looks like something, doesn't it? Can we stop it through prayer? A lot of the visions that the Lord gives me, we change through prayer. I don't consider myself a prophet; I've said that a thousand times. I believe I'm a watchman. The Lord said, 'I've called you to go on YouTube and pray and I will show you things that are going to happen in the future about world events and you will change it through prayer on this channel—governmental things, voting, all of it.' That's my main focus. A lot of people ask, 'Is that prophetic?' I see things and the Lord tells me to pray. So, is that prophetic? You label me whatever you want; I don't care. I don't label myself. I just keep close to Him. But whenever I see part of a word coming to pass, I start to look. It was a window; it doesn't last very long. As I told you, Venezuela and Iran and all these were trying to be part of the BRICS in the days ahead. I saw Trump strategically—Braden has the videos—eliminating the new BRICS system so that it becomes weak. They needed funding. Venezuela, Iran's oil, and other nations in Africa rising up to back the BRICS currency. I saw Trump attacking that. This is exactly what I believe is happening. It makes the dollar strong and makes it where they don't have a BRICS anymore. BRICS goes away. As I saw Macron and these other men, they try to rise up a greater war in Europe to support the euro. I saw the euro would be in trouble and war break out. It all goes to a digital platform in the days ahead to a beast system with crypto, and the foundation is being laid. I don't know, folks. All I know is when I see all the signs of the times all around us right now, it sure looks like the Book of Revelation. It looks like the things that we've been waiting for. It's time to get serious with Jesus. It's time to get your heart right, get out of compromise, and put your eyes to the skies. People ask, 'Brandon, where do you think it could come?' I look for Him every day. But I know I usually look around the Jewish feast time frames—Rosh Hashanah—during that time frame for what Sister Billie and everybody teaches. I'm not an eschatology expert, y'all. It's hard for me to understand the Book of Revelation, but I try. I study as much as I can with Perry Stone and other men like Rick Renner. I try to grasp what they say, but they're over my head a lot of times. John Bevere's book was the easiest for me to understand so far. He doesn't try to talk in algebra. I can grasp that. Make it simple. If my kid, Paisley, can't understand it, then it's too complicated. Make it where people can grab a hold of it. If you try to talk about living by faith in a way that people can't get a hold of it, how are you going to go from glory to glory? Faith comes by hearing and hearing by the word of God. If you don't understand the preacher because he talks too educated, then you've got to simplify it for some folks. I'm not trying to be belittling; I'm just saying if you don't have a PhD in theology, make it where someone who is a mechanic can understand. Who cares? The mechanic fixing your car is probably making more money anyway if he has his own body shop. It's just interesting to me because so many people try to be so educated when they talk and you walk away not understanding a thing. I try to make it simple based on what I know, as someone who barely passed high school with a GED. I keep pushing and grab a hold of what God has given me. I'm a bulldog on a bone; I'm not giving up until I've got a hold of it. I liked what I heard about John Bevere's book today from what my wife read me. I hope that blessed you. I tried not to make it too long, but I ended up talking too much. Then I saw this man be assassinated on a stage with microphones in front of him. He was behind a pulpit talking to a crowd, and it looked like he was appointed to be the leader over that nation. As he was talking, someone from the right took him out. It went through his collarbone area—he probably had a bulletproof vest on—but it went through his neck area and out. He was done. As I watched this, I heard the people screaming. I could see it in the vision. I heard the people screaming and acting up, freaking out because of what they just witnessed. But they brought in another after this man was taken over. I saw this man after he was done; I saw a bad leader come in again, and the Lord—I heard Him say, "I told you the window of this." I mean, I told you this would be a window, not a door—not like Cuba, not like Mexico, not like Venezuela. I'll bring in leaders for those nations, and great revival will come forth out of there, but there'll be a longer time frame. I saw Iran flip quickly back to bringing in some bozo like the Ayatollah again. It was a window for the church to have a major revival. So I pray for that man, Reza Pahlavi, or whatever his name is. I pray for his safety. I don't wish evil upon anybody; I tell you what I see. It was a very colorful vision, very bold. I could see the microphones that were in front of his face. I don't know where he was. It looked to be like sandstone buildings around him. They were like a yellow-looking color, almost like a burnt red-orange looking color building—some kind of sandstone or stucco. But as I saw that, it was short-lived. You can let a bird out of a cage, but if they know how to live in bondage and they've never been free before, they don't know how to fly. They don't know how to get out and be done. They're so used to living in bondage. People have been so used to living in bondage for decade after decade since the 1970s. They said when the Ayatollah got in there, and then here we are. You can free them, but are they free inside? It’s the same thing with Egypt, the same thing with the children of Israel coming out of Egypt. They were bound inside their minds, and it took a whole new generation to come up and let the old ones die off before they could go and take the land. You've got to get stinking thinking out of your thinking and realize that you're more than a conqueror—that God has come to set you free. But as long as you think bound, you'll be bound. As a man thinketh in his heart, so is he. And that's what the Lord is showing me. I can free them, Brandon. I can free them, but they're not free. Even if I let them out and open the cage door and say, "Free bird, fly," they're so used to being on that perch, being the one trapped, that they don't realize the door's open and they have an opportunity. They still think back and go back to the way they were in bondage. It was better in Egypt. It was better in Egypt. Even after I freed them: "It's better in Egypt." I give them manna from heaven—and John said in that book, it was boxcars full of manna. Every morning God provided a miracle—huge amounts of food, thousands and thousands of pounds for millions of people. Every morning God provided, but it's better in Egypt because Egypt was still inside of them. They didn't realize, "We're free. We can take the land. The God of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob is with us." They didn't want to go up on the mountain; they sent Moses. I refuse to allow the devil to keep me bound in my thinking. It's time to come up higher and realize who we are. He's the accuser of the brethren, folks. He tries to tell you all the time you're a loser, but we're winners. Jesus made us winners; we're more than conquerors. So, Father, we just thank You for the body that was broken for us. As we praise You tonight for all that You've done for setting us free, Father, thank You, Lord, for the Iranian people, that they'll take hold of this opportunity and get ready for the greatest revival they've ever seen. It will be all around them if they'll grab hold of it—the church. They'll take this opportunity and bring in the souls all throughout the region. I thank You, Father, for the body that was broken. You were wounded for our transgressions; You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes, we are healed. We thank You, Lord, that we don't have to be sick in our bodies anymore. We thank You, Lord, that we walk in divine health, and we take this body in the name of Jesus and receive it by faith. We have a covenant. This is a cup of the covenant. Jesus took it all, and we don't have to have it. Father, I thank You, Lord, that our sins are forgiven. The moment we confess our sins, You are faithful and just to forgive us and cleanse us of all unrighteousness. We plead the blood, we apply the blood, and we make much of the blood. The blood makes much of us. We thank You, Lord. There's a bloodline around us: over my mind, over my health, over my finances, over my wife, my children, all of us—God, my dogs. Father, I thank You, Lord. The blessing of the Lord is on our house. Father, this is the beginning of March, and I thank You, Lord, that the blood moon was last night. The signs of the times are all around us again. You're screaming in the sky, Lord. You're yelling, telling everybody, "Are we listening? Are we listening to what You're saying?" I take this blood right now in the name of Jesus, and we apply it to us. Amen and amen. I have to say one more thing. I noticed about two or three weeks ago, when I hear Him and that cloak comes on, I feel like I can hear Him like I'm talking to Braden. It's that loud.
